Package com.eventstore.dbclient

Class CreatePersistentSubscriptionToStreamOptions

java.lang.Object
com.eventstore.dbclient.CreatePersistentSubscriptionToStreamOptions
public class CreatePersistentSubscriptionToStreamOptions extends Object
Options for the create persistent subscription to stream request.

    Do not require the request to be performed by the leader of the cluster.

    Don't resolve linkTo events to their linked events.

  • Method Details

    • get

      public static CreatePersistentSubscriptionToStreamOptions get()
      Returns options with default values.

    • fromStart

      public CreatePersistentSubscriptionToStreamOptions fromStart()
      Starts the subscription from the beginning of the given stream.

    • fromEnd

      public CreatePersistentSubscriptionToStreamOptions fromEnd()
      Starts the subscription from the end of the given stream.

    • startFrom

      public CreatePersistentSubscriptionToStreamOptions startFrom(long revision)
      Starts the subscription from the given stream revision.

    • enableLinkResolution

      @Deprecated public CreatePersistentSubscriptionToStreamOptions enableLinkResolution()
      Deprecated.
      prefer resolveLinkTos()

    • disableLinkResolution

      @Deprecated public CreatePersistentSubscriptionToStreamOptions disableLinkResolution()
      Deprecated.
      prefer notResolveLinkTos()

    • resolveLinks

      @Deprecated public CreatePersistentSubscriptionToStreamOptions resolveLinks(boolean value)
      Deprecated.
      prefer resolveLinkTos(boolean)

    • resolveLinkTos

      public CreatePersistentSubscriptionToStreamOptions resolveLinkTos(boolean value)
      Whether the subscription should resolve linkTo events to their linked events. Default: false.

    • resolveLinkTos

      public CreatePersistentSubscriptionToStreamOptions resolveLinkTos()
      Resolve linkTo events to their linked events.

    • notResolveLinkTos

      public CreatePersistentSubscriptionToStreamOptions notResolveLinkTos()
      Don't resolve linkTo events to their linked events.

    • enableExtraStatistics

      public CreatePersistentSubscriptionToStreamOptions enableExtraStatistics()
      Enable tracking of latency statistics on this subscription.

    • disableExtraStatistics

      public CreatePersistentSubscriptionToStreamOptions disableExtraStatistics()
      Disable tracking of latency statistics on this subscription.

    • extraStatistics

      public CreatePersistentSubscriptionToStreamOptions extraStatistics(boolean value)
      Whether to track latency statistics on this subscription. Default: false.

    • checkpointAfter

      public CreatePersistentSubscriptionToStreamOptions checkpointAfter(Duration value)
      The amount of time to try to checkpoint after. Default: 2 seconds.

    • checkpointAfterInMs

      public CreatePersistentSubscriptionToStreamOptions checkpointAfterInMs(int value)
      The amount of time in milliseconds to try to checkpoint after. Default: 2 seconds.

    • historyBufferSize

      public CreatePersistentSubscriptionToStreamOptions historyBufferSize(int value)
      The number of events to cache when catching up. Default: 500.

    • liveBufferSize

      public CreatePersistentSubscriptionToStreamOptions liveBufferSize(int value)
      The size of the buffer (in-memory) listening to live messages as they happen before paging occurs. Default: 500.

    • maxCheckpointCount

      @Deprecated public CreatePersistentSubscriptionToStreamOptions maxCheckpointCount(int value)
      Deprecated.
      prefer checkpointUpperBound(int)

    • checkpointUpperBound

      public CreatePersistentSubscriptionToStreamOptions checkpointUpperBound(int value)
      The maximum number of messages not checkpointed before forcing a checkpoint. Default: 1000.

    • minCheckpointCount

      @Deprecated public CreatePersistentSubscriptionToStreamOptions minCheckpointCount(int value)
      Deprecated.
      prefer checkpointLowerBound(int)

    • checkpointLowerBound

      public CreatePersistentSubscriptionToStreamOptions checkpointLowerBound(int value)
      The minimum number of messages to process before a checkpoint may be written. Default: 10.

    • maxSubscriberCount

      public CreatePersistentSubscriptionToStreamOptions maxSubscriberCount(int value)
      The maximum number of subscribers allowed. Default: 0 (Unbounded).

    • maxRetryCount

      public CreatePersistentSubscriptionToStreamOptions maxRetryCount(int value)
      The maximum number of retries (due to timeout) before a message is considered to be parked. Default: 10.

    • messageTimeout

      public CreatePersistentSubscriptionToStreamOptions messageTimeout(Duration value)
      The amount of time after which to consider a message as timed out and retried. Default: 30 seconds.

    • messageTimeoutInMs

      public CreatePersistentSubscriptionToStreamOptions messageTimeoutInMs(int value)
      The amount of time in milliseconds after which to consider a message as timed out and retried. Default: 30 seconds.

    • readBatchSize

      public CreatePersistentSubscriptionToStreamOptions readBatchSize(int value)
      The number of events read at a time when catching up. Default: 20.

    • namedConsumerStrategy

      public CreatePersistentSubscriptionToStreamOptions namedConsumerStrategy(NamedConsumerStrategy value)
      The strategy to use for distributing events to client consumers.

      Returns:
      updated options

      Do not require the request to be performed by the leader of the cluster.
